# AccessoryError.unsupportedPlatform

**Case**

An error that indicates the current platform doesn’t support notification forwarding.

## Declaration

```swift
case unsupportedPlatform
```

## Discussion

This error can occur if you call [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotificationCenter/requestForwarding(for:)] on a platform other than iOS.

## Platform and accessory errors

- **AccessoryError.unsupportedAccessory**: An error that indicates the system doesn’t support notification forwarding for the provided accessory.
